overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city environment at night, ascending from a covered neon-lit stairway to an open waterfront plaza. The scene features the 'Marquess' building, palm trees, and a harbor view with distant industrial structures, characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian stairway with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking up a wide concrete staircase in a covered urban walkway, passing pedestrians going in both directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple jacket ascending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: dark overhanging roof structure covering the stairway
wide gray concrete staircase with multiple steps
traditional red spherical lanterns hanging outside a building entrance
building exterior with purple neon lighting and large windows
linear cyan and purple neon lights along the ceiling and walls

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a wide concrete staircase within a covered cyberpunk-style walkway. Neon lights in purple and cyan illuminate the scene, while red paper lanterns mark a building entrance on the left. Pedestrians move in both directions on the stairs, and the covered roof structure creates an enclosed urban canyon effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and waterfront access

events.description: exits the covered stairway into an open plaza with visible sky and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the waterfront, passing by food carts and palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in beige outfit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large modern building with illuminated 'MARQUESS' signage on the facade
tall palm trees silhouetted against the evening sky
small food vendor cart with umbrella and lighting
spacious open concrete area leading to the waterfront

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a spacious plaza with the Marquess building on the left and palm trees lining the right side. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to a mix of ambient city glow and the last light of dusk. The camera moves forward across the paved plaza toward the waterfront, passing pedestrians and a food cart.

events.description: reaches the waterfront railing with view of harbor and distant industrial structures

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, observing the harbor view and distant city skyline

entered.detail: metal railing separating the walkway from the water
dark water of the harbor reflecting city lights
silhouettes of cranes and industrial buildings across the water
small illuminated green food stand with vendor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the waterfront promenade, with a metal railing on the right overlooking the dark harbor water. The sky is overcast with a greenish-yellow glow on the horizon. Distant industrial structures and cranes are visible across the water. The Marquess building falls behind as the camera progresses along the walkway, passing a green food kiosk and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exterior walkway returning to entrance

events.description: turns left away from the waterfront to walk back toward the building complex

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along the building exterior, returning toward the covered entrance area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking alongside the building

entered.detail: returning to the modern building with illuminated signage, now showing the entrance area
dark entranceway leading back into the building complex

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the waterfront and walks back along the building exterior. The Marquess building reappears on the left with its illuminated signage, while the harbor view is left behind. The scene transitions back toward a more enclosed urban environment with the building entrance ahead, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and food carts along the railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that ascends from a neon-lit urban corridor into an open waterfront plaza before circling back toward the city's architecture. It begins with a climb up a wide concrete staircase within a covered walkway, where purple and cyan neon lights and red paper lanterns create an enclosed, atmospheric canyon. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a spacious plaza where the lighting shifts from artificial neon to a dim dusk glow, passing palm trees and the Marquess building. The movement then carries forward along a waterfront promenade, overlooking a dark harbor with distant industrial cranes under a greenish-yellow horizon. Finally, the camera turns away from the water to walk back along the exterior of the Marquess building, transitioning from the open coast back into a crowded urban environment filled with food carts and pedestrians with umbrellas.
